cta.desc: Wordcroft continues to build a logistics network designed for scale, reliability, and long-term impact across Africa.

hero.title: Established 2003
hero.desc: Since 2003, Wordcroft has built a reputation grounded in consistency, discipline, and delivery. We ensure operational excellence across every regional movement.

story.title: A Legacy of Trust
story.desc1: At Wordcroft, we have developed a logistics network that connects Zimbabwe with the broader region, ensuring critical energy and dry goods reach their destination safely and on time.
story.desc2: Our foundation is built on transparency and a relentless focus on operational readiness. We serve major industrial partners with absolute accountability.
story.historyDesc: Wordcroft (Pvt) Ltd was founded with a vision to provide specialized logistics services far beyond simple transport. We operate at the intersection of energy security and regional trade readiness.
story.historyQuote: We don’t just move cargo. We manage risk, timing, and reliability across borders.

reliability.title: One Standard. One Network.
reliability.subtitle: Reliability at scale.
reliability.desc: Our logistics model combines a well-maintained fleet with advanced surveillance and dedicated operations to maintain total accountability across the supply chain.

playbook.title: Disciplined Operational Model
playbook.sub: We deliver value through a repeatable, high-standard process designed for safety and speed.

hero.title: Mission & Values
hero.desc: Since inception, Wordcroft has been guided by a strong value system that shapes every decision.

missionValues.vision: To become a leading regional logistics and energy transport partner, known for reliability, efficiency, and operational excellence.
missionValues.mission: To deliver safe, efficient, and transparent logistics solutions that support economic growth across Zimbabwe and the region.

values.label: Integrity
values.val: Doing the right thing, even when it’s difficult

values.label: Client Value Creation
values.val: Delivering measurable value to every client

values.label: Diligence
values.val: Attention to detail in every operation

hero.title: Partnerships
hero.desc: Wordcroft collaborates with major energy companies and industrial groups to move Southern Africa’s future.

partnerships.storyDesc: At Wordcroft, we believe our strength comes from our network. We collaborate with operators and industrial leaders who have proven traction and are ready to scale logistics across Zimbabwe and neighboring countries.

hero.title: Wordcroft News
hero.desc: Stay informed about our latest regional logistics operations and industrial partnerships.

announcement.title: Stay informed
announcement.desc: News articles and announcements regarding Wordcroft and our regional logistics network will be published here. Check back soon for updates.

hero.title: Insights
hero.desc: In-depth analysis of regional trade trends and logistics infrastructure in Southern Africa.

content.title: Operational & Trade Perspectives
content.desc: Our team regularly publishes perspectives on regional trade trends, supply chain optimization, and logistics infrastructure in Southern Africa. Coming soon.

hero.title: Careers
hero.desc: Discover career opportunities with Wordcroft and help shape the future of regional logistics.

status.title: No openings currently
status.desc: We are not currently recruiting, but we are always interested in connecting with logistics professionals. Please check back later for new opportunities.

hero.title: Sustainability
hero.desc: We believe that moving essential resources reliably and securely is critical to the sustainability of the region's industrial backbone.

impact.title: Delivering impact across the regional logistics network
impact.desc: Wordcroft focuses on sectors that power economies. From fuel supply chains to industrial logistics, our work enables businesses, communities, and entire regions to function effectively.
impact.quote: "Reliability in logistics is not optional—it is essential. We strengthen regional networks to power the future of Zimbabwe and its neighbors."

items.title: Community Empowerment
items.desc: We are deeply rooted in the communities we serve. Wordcroft prioritizes local employment and skills development, ensuring that our growth contributes directly to regional economic empowerment.

items.title: Environmental Stewardship
items.desc: Active participation in regional clean-up campaigns and environmental protection initiatives. We maintain high operational standards to safeguard the ecosystems and communities across our transport routes.

items.title: Local Connectivity
items.desc: Supporting community-led infrastructure initiatives that strengthen local networks and improve essential service access for the people of Zimbabwe and beyond.

services.title: Fuel Transportation
services.desc: Wordcroft specializes in the high-capacity, specialized movement of bulk liquid fuels, including Diesel, Petrol, and Ethanol. Our well-maintained regional fleet operates across the SADC network, providing 24/7 real-time fleet monitoring, route optimization, and rigorous safety compliance to ensure secure energy distribution across borders.

services.title: Dry Goods & General Cargo
services.desc: We provide integrated logistics and transportation solutions for essential industrial and commercial materials. From containerized cargo to bulk general materials, Wordcroft's heavy-duty fleet ensures efficient regional transit through advanced route planning, comprehensive supply chain visibility, and consistent delivery standards for Southern Africa's backbone.

team.name: Lewis Makichi
team.bio:
A highly committed SHEQ Officer with experience in the fuel and transport logistics sector, specializing in managing safety, health, environmental, and quality risks associated with hazardous materials and fleet operations. Adept at ensuring compliance with industry regulations, safe fuel handling procedures, and transport safety standards.

Demonstrates strong expertise in conducting risk assessments for fuel storage, distribution, and transportation activities, including hazardous substance management and spill prevention. Experienced in fleet safety management, driver compliance, route risk analysis, and incident investigation to reduce accidents and operational disruptions.

Skilled in implementing and maintaining SHEQ management systems, carrying out audits and inspections, and developing corrective actions to improve safety performance. Passionate about promoting a proactive safety culture, environmental protection, and continuous improvement in high-risk logistics environments.

Key Competencies:
• Hazardous Materials (HAZCAM) Handling & Compliance
• Fuel Storage & Distribution Safety
• Fleet & Driver Safety Management
• Risk Assessment & Route Hazard Analysis
• Incident & Accident Investigation
• Spill Prevention & Environmental Protection
• SHEQ Audits, Inspections & Reporting
• Legal & Regulatory Compliance
• Emergency Response & Crisis Management
• Safety Training & Toolbox Talks

faqs.question: What regions do you cover?
faqs.answer: We operate primarily in Zimbabwe and neighbouring SADC countries.
